name: open-design
description: Local-first, open-source alternative to Anthropic's Claude Design. Runs on Claude Code / Codex / Cursor / Gemini / OpenCode / Qwen / Copilot / Hermes / Kimi CLI.

name: openclaude
description: Runs anywhere, uses anything. Agent-agnostic harness.

name: AionUi
description: Free, open-source 24/7 cowork app and OpenClaw for Gemini CLI, Claude Code, Codex, OpenCode, Qwen Code, Goose CLI, Auggie, and more.

name: clawsweeper
description: Scans all issues and PRs and suggests what to close, and why. Runs weekly.

name: deepclaude
description: Use Claude Code's autonomous agent loop with DeepSeek V4 Pro or any Anthropic-compatible backend. Same UX, 17x cheaper.

name: open-slide
description: A slide framework built for agents.

name: codex-plusplus
description: Codex++ tweak system for the Codex desktop app.

name: chromex
description: Codex-powered Chrome side-panel assistant for page context, tabs, voice, and image workflows.

name: RunbookHermes
description: Hermes-native AIOps agent for evidence-driven incident response, approval-gated remediation, and runbook learning.

name: hermes-labyrinth
description: Read-only observability plugin for Hermes Agent: journeys, crossings, guideposts, and reports.

name: hermes-agent-guide
description: Hermes Agent 从入门到精通中文指南，全书 16 册、30 万+ 字，覆盖安装部署到高阶开发。

name: QuantClaw-plugin
description: Plug-and-play task-type routing quantization plugin for OpenClaw.
